items.title: VIVATECH 2026: Rebuilding business models with AI
items.description: What role will artificial intelligence play in business development and daily life? It’s one of the questions dominating this year’s Vivatech, Europe’s biggest event focused on startups and innovation. Our business editor Kate Moody sat down with Julia White, Vice President and Chief Marketing Officer of Amazon Web Services, to find out about the tech giant’s new AI shopping assistant, what jobs AI can and cannot do, and how to bring more women into leadership positions in Silicon Valley.

items.title: UNHCR campaign to defend fundamental human right to asylum ahead of World Refugee Day
items.description: The UNHCR launched it's "Until Everyone is Safe" campaign. It's a call to young people across the world to reclaim and defend the fundamental human right of asylum as a shared global good. •The campaign challenges stereotypes against refugees, emphasizing that the right to seek safety is a crucial lifeline that means far more than the absence of war and violence. It encompasses the legal right to work, access health care, pursue an education, and live with dignity—the exact tools needed to move beyond survival and rebuild a future. FRANCE 24's Mark Owen speaks with Eujin Byun, Global Spokesperson for the UNHCR, the UN refugee agency.

items.title: Lula warns Trump against meddling in Brazil election after criticism of judiciary
items.description: Brazilian President Luiz Inácio Lula da Silva on Wednesday warned US President Donald Trump against interfering in Brazil's October presidential election after renewed US criticism of judicial actions against Lula's political opponents. The exchange underscores rising tensions as Washington pushes new tariffs and labels two drug-trafficking groups as foreign terrorist organisations.

items.title: Middle East live: Trump, Iran's president sign deal to end Mideast war
items.description: US President Donald Trump and Iran's president signed a deal Wednesday meant to end the Middle East war, with Tehran agreeing to dilute its enriched uranium in return for large-scale economic relief. Trump put his signature to the memorandum of understanding during dinner with French President Emmanuel Macron at the Palace of Versailles following a G7 summit. Follow our liveblog for all the latest developments.

items.title: Artist JR's wrapped bridge opens in Paris in nod to Christo
